name: TM
title: HL7 v2 TM Data Type
description: A time value in the format HH[MM[SS[.S[S[S[S]]]]]][+/-ZZZZ]. The minimum precision is to the hour (2 digits, 00-23). Minute, second, and fractional second components are optional but must appear in order. Up to four digits of fractional seconds are supported. An optional timezone offset (+/-ZZZZ) indicates the difference between local time and UTC.
